headline: TSITE - אתר חכם רק ב-650 ש"ח לשנה

image_prompt: Professional editorial photography of a modern website development environment. The scene features a dimly lit workspace with sleek, minimalist design elements. The overall mood is high-tech and sophisticated, with dramatic depth of field, rich textures and detail, and cinematic lighting.
